title: Rat Lung Fibrosis Orbit detection model
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"5n5qb","text":"To ensure reliable quantification of rat lung fibrosis, support vector machine learning was used on digitalized images to design a fully automated method that analyzes two important aspects of lung fibrosis: (i) areas having substantial tissue remodeling with appearance of dense fibrotic masses and (ii) collagen deposition.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
guidelines: {"blocks":[{"key":"4j0ro","text":"The detection model is working for fixed (under pressure) rat lung paraffin sections cut 2um thick and stained for Masson's trichrome (applicable staining range described in the linked manuscript)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
creator: Shanon Seger
